CustomField.description: Enabling this checkbox will apply changes to individual validation records, and future updates will reflect this setting. Users can override this at the individual validation record level using the 'Accepted' checkbox. Once overridden, the 'Accept All' value will no longer apply to those individual records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enabling this checkbox will apply changes to individual validation records, and future updates will reflect this setting. Users can override this at the individual validation record level using the 'Accepted' checkbox. Once overridden, the 'Accept All' value will no longer apply to those individual records.
CustomField.label: Accept All
